creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
Created attachment 148295
patch to make port build successfully again

Somehow some external change has caused mod_authnz_crowd to build shared libraries ending with .0.0.0 and symlinking the .so files to them. This patch allows crowd to build properly again.

Note that this only works if you globally set the default apache port to 2.2, since this module does not build against 2.4 API at all.
